# SailfinIO

We build the **Sailfin programming language** — an AI-native, systems-friendly language designed for precision, safety, and introspection.

Sailfin is a pre-1.0 open-source project developed in the open. The self-hosted native compiler, runtime, standard library, documentation, and website all live in a single public monorepo.

## What We're Working On

| Project | Description |
|---|---|
| [sailfin](https://github.com/SailfinIO/sailfin) | The Sailfin compiler, runtime, tooling, and documentation |

## Learn More

- [sailfin.dev](https://sailfin.dev) — official language website, documentation, and guides
